title: Plate Armor +
body:
# Replaces Iron Armor With Plate!
This is your new resource pack, Plate Armor +.

Total Changes
- Replaces Iron Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots and Horse Armor Models with Plate 
- Changes only the Horse Armor & Chesplate Items. If you want custom items for other Resource Packs, I will make one upon request!

Credits
- Huge credit to Askywalker, as he originally made the pack and a few things such as a couple textures were originally his, but heavily edited by me.
- And some credit to Notch, as he created the Original Plate Armor Texture. Not that important in the scope of things he's made though....

If you would like to edit this pack and upload it, please credit me. After all, this pack is built on another anyways..

If you report any bugs on any version, please dm me on other platforms with info. Thanks!
-MrNoobNub
